creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Tue Jan  7 08:55:04 2014
New Revision: 338986
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338986

Log:
  New Port: sysutils/p5-Rex
  
  (R)?ex is a remote execution and configuration management framework written in Perl.
  
  PR:		ports/185357
  Submitted by:	Sam Cassiba <sam@cassiba.com>

Added:
  head/sysutils/p5-Rex/
  head/sysutils/p5-Rex/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/p5-Rex/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/p5-Rex/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/p5-Rex/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/Makefile

Modified: head/sysutils/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/Makefile	Tue Jan  7 08:33:14 2014	(r338985)
+++ head/sysutils/Makefile	Tue Jan  7 08:55:04 2014	(r338986)
@@ -616,6 +616,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-Proc-PidUtil
     SUBDIR += p5-Proclet
     SUBDIR += p5-Quota
+    SUBDIR += p5-Rex
     SUBDIR += p5-Samba-SIDhelper
     SUBDIR += p5-Schedule-At
     SUBDIR += p5-Schedule-Cron

Added: head/sysutils/p5-Rex/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/p5-Rex/Makefile	Tue Jan  7 08:55:04 2014	(r338986)
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	Rex
+PORTVERSION=	0.43.7
+CATEGORIES=	sysutils perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:JFRIED
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	sam@cassiba.com
+COMMENT=	Perl framework for automation and systems administration
+
+LICENSE=	APACHE20
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	\
+	p5-Net-SSH2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-SSH2 \
+	p5-Expect>=0:${PORTSDIR}/lang/p5-Expect \
+	p5-DBI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBI \
+	p5-Digest-HMAC>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-HMAC \
+	p5-HTTP-Date>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTTP-Date \
+	p5-JSON-XS>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON-XS \
+	p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
+	p5-String-Escape>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-String-Escape \
+	p5-XML-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Simple \
+	p5-YAML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-YAML
+
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+
+USES=		perl5
+USE_PERL5=	configure
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/sysutils/p5-Rex/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/p5-Rex/distinfo	Tue Jan  7 08:55:04 2014	(r338986)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Rex-0.43.7.tar.gz) = cfa5a18c5f1eaa343c0e5c82cc06304f6a3e3c6ffa5b2798446e67889ba28bea
+SIZE (Rex-0.43.7.tar.gz) = 176608

Added: head/sysutils/p5-Rex/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/p5-Rex/pkg-descr	Tue Jan  7 08:55:04 2014	(r338986)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+(R)?ex is a server orchestration tool to ease the execution of remote commands.
+
+WWW: http://rexify.org/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Rex/

Added: head/sysutils/p5-Rex/pkg-plist
